rationale: Builds directly on the current best soft quant-aware projection ramp, but replaces some of the endgame dead time between full roundtrip snaps with a lighter projection-only pull. The hypothesis is that the best script already identified non-FP16 projection weights as the highest-value int8 adaptation target, and nudging only those tensors toward their exact final roundtrip every few quant-aware steps should reduce last-mile quantization mismatch without paying the instability cost of more frequent whole-model snaps or the artifact cost of more FP16 rescue.
title: Quant-Aware Projection Micro-Pull
